title: Housing.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Housing.com is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Housing.com family as a Full Stack Developer in Agra. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
